import React from 'react'; const Experience = () => { return (

Experience

Brandcrock India Pvt. Ltd. Chennai

January 2023 - PRESENT

As a Backend Developer at Brandcrock India Pvt. Ltd. I focus on the development and enhancement of client Shopware stores, utilizing Shopware versions 5 and 6.

My responsibilities include:
  • Developing extensions for Shopware 5 and 6 to meet client needs.
  • Upgrading client shops from lower to higher versions of Shopware.
  • Migrating data from Shopware 5 to Shopware 6 for client stores.
  • Identifying and resolving critical bugs within client shops.
  • Implementing optimizations that enhanced site speed, achieving a 50% reduction in loading time.
  • Customizing plugins based on specific client requirements.

Additionally, I work on Odoo 17 development, with responsibilities that include:

  • Custom module development.
  • Website build and development.
  • Bug fixing and code optimization.
  • Customizing third-party and core modules to align with client needs.

Novalnet e-Solutions Pvt Ltd, Chennai

October 2021 - December 2022

As a Backend Developer at Novalnet e-Solutions Pvt Ltd, I focused on developing plugins into the Shopware 5 platforms.

My responsibilities include:
  • Custom module development.
  • Conducting critical bug fixes and providing ongoing client support to ensure optimal system performance.

Apple G Web Technology Pvt Ltd, Chennai

July 2018 - October 2021

As a Full Stack Developer at Apple G Web Technology Pvt Ltd, I was responsible for the development and enhancement of client websites and the creation of APIs for mobile applications.

My responsibilities include:
  • Developing content management system (CMS) projects tailored to client needs.
  • Implementing enterprise resource planning (ERP) solutions for various clients.
  • Performing critical bug fixes to ensure the functionality and reliability of client applications.
  • Maintaining and monitoring applications to optimize performance.
  • Analyzing new requirements and implementing effective solutions.
); }; export default Experience;
